_comment: Template documenting the consolidated JSON the /system-report master skill assembles (introduced 2026-06-22). It runs the three existing reviews (/health-review, /performance-review, /ml-review) in report mode and synthesizes one executive report. The three sub-objects `health`, `performance`, `ml` carry each review's own response shape verbatim (see comms/schema/{health,performance,ml}_review_response.template.json — do NOT re-declare their fields here, a second copy drifts). The `consolidated` block is the cross-domain executive synthesis + the report-specific data (trade dossiers, market context, per-class PnL). This file is documentation, not a validated JSON Schema. Renderer: scripts/reports/render_system_report.py. Spec: docs/reports/system-report-DESIGN.md.
prior_report_id: RPT-... | null (first report, or no prior in this window class)

health._comment: Verbatim /health-review response — shape in comms/schema/health_review_response.template.json. Run in report mode (its individual send-ping is SUPPRESSED; the report sends one consolidated ping). `claude_channel_ping.delivered_via` = 'suppressed (system-report)'.

performance._comment: Verbatim /performance-review response — shape in comms/schema/performance_review_response.template.json. Run in report mode (individual ping suppressed). Its trade_decision_grades[] feed the consolidated.trade_dossiers[] join.

ml._comment: Verbatim /ml-review response — shape in comms/schema/ml_review_response.template.json. Run in report mode (individual ping suppressed).

consolidated._comment: Cross-domain executive synthesis + report-specific data not produced by any single review.
consolidated.roll_up_grade: healthy | caution | investigate — worst-of the three reviews' overall_assessment
consolidated.headline: <= 240 chars — one-paragraph 'what happened since the last report'

operator_priorities._comment: Top 3-5 prioritized actions distilled across all three reviews. Highest-severity first.
operator_priorities.title: <= 120 chars

cross_review_notes: free-form — patterns that span domains (e.g. health flags signal->order plumbing on BTCUSDT AND performance shows a rejection cluster on the same symbol)

pnl_by_class._comment: Real / paper / prop are NEVER blended (live-trade management contract P4). Each is computed over the window AND the prior equal-length window so the report can show the trend (better/worse). Prop is sourced from the prop journal (isolated tables), not `trades`. Null any value not derivable.

paper._comment: Same shape as `real`, computed over paper-account rows only.

prop._comment: From /api/bot/prop/* — fills + account-status, NOT the `trades` table. rule_distance is the cushion to the account-killer limits.

market_context._comment: One row per traded symbol (enumerated live via _discover_symbols, never hardcoded). Window OHLC + % change from /api/bot/candles so performance reads against market behavior. Null on a candle-fetch failure (do not fabricate a 0).
market_context.note: <= 160 chars — one-line regime read (trending up / chop / sold off, etc.)

trade_dossiers._comment: The reviewable-one-by-one per-trade decision map. ADAPTIVE DEPTH: full dossier per trade for window in {since-last, daily}; for {weekly, monthly} only `notable=true` outliers get the full dossier, the rest are summarized in pnl_by_class.per_strategy + a count in `dossier_coverage`. Joins /api/bot/trades/closed + /api/bot/order-packages (by linkedTradeId) + the performance review's A-F grade.
trade_dossiers.close_reason: tp | sl | manual | reconciler | other | null

claude_grade._comment: From the performance review (comms/claude_strategy_scores.jsonl, joined by order_package_id). null until graded.
claude_grade.grade: A | B | C | D | F | null
claude_grade.entry_quality: optimal | acceptable | late | early | should_skip | unknown
claude_grade.exit_quality: optimal | tp_appropriate | sl_appropriate | premature_exit | held_too_long | unknown
claude_grade.risk_management: correct | oversize | undersize | sl_too_tight | sl_too_wide | unknown

model_scores._comment: order_packages.model_scores — {model_id: {stage, score}} captured at signal time. null for pre-column rows.

trade_dossiers.signal_logic: the decision reasoning the bot recorded at signal time (order_packages.signal_logic), or null

dossier_coverage._comment: How the adaptive-depth rule resolved for this report.

backlog_summary._comment: Roll-up of the three reviews' backlog_drain[] this run + open counts.

tier3_proposals_pending._comment: Tier-3 items the reviews PROPOSED (never enacted) — surfaced so the operator sees the decision queue in one place.

artifacts._comment: Where this report was written. Relative to repo root; the VM's ict-git-sync mirrors comms/ so /api/bot/reports serves them.

claude_channel_ping._comment: The ONE consolidated ping for the whole report (the three sub-reviews' individual pings are suppressed). Posted via the send-ping system-action. Carries the report link.
